title: Umut's Vanilla
description: We're not here to promise you flying dragons or wild fantasies — we're offering you a refined, enhanced vanilla experience. Familiar, but better.
body:
### _NOTE: I took most of the photos with the "Stay True" texture pack, but this texture pack is not available in modrinth, so it caused problems while publishing the modpack. You can install it yourself in-game with the "Resourcify" mod._
### 
**First of all, big thanks to TRDoruk for helping me make the modpack.**

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38d152ecfc94d4b85309c67e5fcb8980c34d0bc9.png)

\-Improved world generation (Terralith, Biomes O' Plenty, Geophilic, RU)

![](https://i.imgur.com/pOCBvgb.jpeg)

\-Vanilla+ dungeon and structure mods that increase your desire to explore (DnT, MVS...)

![](https://i.imgur.com/KJuMA7x.jpeg)

\-QoL Mods (Right Click Harvest, JEI, Carry on…)

![](https://i.imgur.com/yq768AB.jpeg)

\-Immortalize memories with your friends (Exposure)

![](https://i.imgur.com/o9BqtZc.jpeg)

\-Even cooking is fun now (Farmer's Delight)

![](https://i.ibb.co/RppLcw1k/2025-08-05-14-49-14.png)

\-Tons of optimization and animation mods.

![](https://i.ibb.co/tN54Hbh/animat.jpg)

\-World Sharing and Hundreds of Cosmetics and Emotes (Essential Mod)

![](https://i.ibb.co/21SFL33m/2025-08-05-14-58-53.png)

\-Thanks to AntiXray, there is no room for cheaters on your server!

![](https://i.ibb.co/TMKPC1bZ/Whats-App-G-rsel-2025-07-31-saat-16-53-51-0d60508e.jpg)

\-Improved Details (Particular, Visuality…)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B1CcCd9h/images/7da8ffc04d05e6efd9cb6b3b013b6872654c3177.gif)

\-A non-boring ending (BetterEnd, True Ending…)

![](https://i.ibb.co/Ldhcc0vP/2025-08-05-15-06-12.png)

\-Carefully selected texture and shader packs (You can also add it yourself via Resourcify in-game.)

![resourcify](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cfea7ed1a5653dc386bb55da9657eabf8c8fe6a.webp)
